backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing product and tarot service management with CRUD operations, filtering by type/category/trending status, and fixed pricing (₹500 base + ₹400 markup).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single feature to update serviceGalleryImages.ts with 8 new screenshot filenames, mapped to multiple components and test ID REQ-29.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of 17 frontend files describing components (Hero, About, Services, Reviews, ProductCatalog, etc.), data files, utilities, and configuration for the Mystic Moon with Ishita spiritual services website.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode CSS variables for mystical theme colors and UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, page title, and script loader for the Mystic Moon with Ishita React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering the full single-page application layout with Header, Hero, About, Services, ServicesGallery, ImportantNotes, Reviews, ProductCatalog, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section showcasing Ishita's profile with healer portrait image, 4 years experience, intuitive tarot expertise, and crystal healing knowledge in a card-based layout with mystical icons.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with three-column layout displaying business info, services list, shop categories, Instagram link, copyright notice, and caffeine.ai attribution with dynamic UTM parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with centered Mystic Moon logo image that scrolls to top on click, featuring responsive sizing and backdrop blur styling.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero banner with animated mystical gradient effects, Sparkles icon fallback, unified branding title, and dual CTAs for services and products with scroll-to-section links.
frontend/src/components/ImportantNotes.t: Displays a grid of four important service notes (delivery time, format, restrictions, confidentiality) using cards with emoji icons and styled text.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a single product card with image, type badge, name, description, and calculated final price with hover effects and styling.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Displays a filterable product catalog with tabs for all/crystal/bracelet/pendulum categories, rendering ProductCard components in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Shows client testimonials in a responsive grid of cards, each displaying a 5-star rating, review text, reviewer name, date, and category badge.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Fetches and displays tarot reading services from the backend actor with pricing, includes a custom SVG hand-pentacle decoration, and shows loading skeletons during data fetch.
Displays a grid gallery of service images with hover effects and a call-to-action button linking to Instagram for booking readings.
frontend/src/data/products.ts: Defines the Product interface and exports an array of 15+ crystal, bracelet, and pendulum products with IDs, names, descriptions, types, base prices, and image URLs.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: Defines a Review interface and exports a hardcoded array of 15+ customer reviews for tarot sessions and crystal purchases, dated January-February 2026.
frontend/src/data/serviceGalleryImages.t: Defines ServiceGalleryImage interface and exports an array mapping service categories (Career, Love, Forecasts, etc.) to Instagram screenshot image paths with descriptive labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an ICP actor instance using Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating products and tarot services from the backend actor, including filtering by type/category and managing trending items.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom mystical color palette (purple, rose, gold, cream) for light and dark modes, plus custom font families (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/utils/pricing.ts: Utility functions for calculating final product prices (base price + ₹400 markup) and formatting prices in Indian Rupees with proper locale formatting.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, including mystic-themed colors (purple, rose, gold, cream), extended theme for sidebar, charts, and UI components, plus accordion animations and container queries plugin.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for Mystic Moon tarot/crystal shop website, defining 8 existing features including Instagram integration, about section, 35 customer reviews, product catalog with ₹900+ pricing, booking system for tarot readings (₹199-₹1,999), and noting Razorpay payment integration as a known missing feature.
